_description: About Page Content - MARELUNE BALI CMS
title: About Marelune Bali
description: Meet Marelune Bali, a private yacht agency focused on refined ocean journeys around Bali.
_heroNote: Hero section dengan background image besar

hero._imageTip: Gunakan gambar yang merepresentasikan brand - yacht, ocean, Bali scenery
hero.title: ABOUT US
hero.subtitle: We turn Bali sea days into private, well-composed journeys with local route knowledge and premium service standards.

_storyNote: Brand story section - Kenapa Marelune exists

story.title: Built for guests who want calm luxury
story.body: Marelune Bali exists for travelers who want the ocean experience to feel handled, beautiful, and personal. The focus is simple: clear options, fast confirmation, refined presentation, and routes that make sense for Bali's real conditions.

_teamNote: Team section - Key people di balik Marelune
_teamTip: 3-4 team members ideal. Photos harus professional.
_faqNote: FAQ section untuk About page - Specific questions tentang brand/process

faq.question: How do I book?
faq.answer: Choose a preferred route or package, submit the booking form, and the team will confirm availability by WhatsApp.

faq.question: Can the trip be customized?
faq.answer: Yes. Date, route, guest count, celebration setup, and yacht tier can be adjusted after the first request.

faq.question: What should I prepare?
faq.answer: Prepare your desired date, number of guests, preferred departure area, and occasion details if the trip is for a celebration.

faq.question: Is payment handled on the website?
faq.answer: Not yet. The website captures leads and routes the request to the team for manual confirmation and payment instructions.
